Snadno se čistí a chrání proti plísním a houbám, což ji činí vhodnou pro mokré a vlhké místnosti s podlahovým vytápěním. CERESIT CE 40 je k dispozici v balení 2 kg a 5 kg a je vhodná pro použití jak v interiéru, tak i exteriéru. items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Kaméleon:                Masterfully bluff, hide and reveal the secret word before your opponents doCamelon Party is an associative bluffing party game with secret roles that the whole family will enjoy. Players are dealt cards that tell them their role, which they must keep secret from others. If the player is a chameleon, he tries to figure out the secret word. If he is not a chameleon, he tries to find out who is a chameleon without giving away the secret word. The secret word for each round is determined by a roll of two dice - each player gets the coordinates to a specific word on the topic card, where there are 16 related words in total. Each player must now say a word that is related to the secret word - but the chameleon can only guess based on all 16 words on the theme card. After all players have expressed their opinions, a vote is taken to decide who is the chameleon. Can he guess the word and not give himself away to others? V průběhu času se ve skartovačích hromadí prach a zbytky papíru, které olej spolehlivě odstraní. Je rostlinného původu a jednoduše se používá díky balení v dávkovací lahvi. Olej HP zajistí spolehlivý provoz skartovače.
